task asks to choose a SMILES expression from a depicted chemical structure, which cannot be recovered from text alone
multi_step: solving likely requires reading the depicted molecular structure and matching it against 4 candidate SMILES options
question adds an instruction to ignore arrows, indicating at least some filtering of visual information before matching
single-answer multiple-choice format limits complexity, so the overall reasoning depth appears moderate rather than high
verifiability: choices are provided and answer_text exactly matches one option ('D')
